text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's once again time for summer training camp. I'm
making preparations for Sweep Tosho's training,
when...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll help too! If there's anything you need, you
have but to ask!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whether it be a tire, a barbell, or even a giant
tuna! You name it and I'll get it for you!
choice_data_list: Thank you, but it's all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine Kawakami Princess joined summer camp
for her own sake. I let her know she should focus
on her own training, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's quite all right. Please allow me to assist you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After all, Sweep promised to cast a spell on
someone for me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to do my part to help make that magic
take effect! ...Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears nothing I say will make her budge—it
reminds me of a certain someone else I know.
Since she insists, I ask her to do some pair running
with Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wheeew! You're so fast, Sweep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After they start running, the gap between Sweep
Tosho and Kawakami Princess quickly widens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The main purpose of pair running is to feel the
adrenaline of running in an actual race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with Kawakami Princess five lengths behind
Sweep Tosho the whole time, they may as well
not be running together at all at this point.
choice_data_list:
I think the difference in your abilities might be
too big...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna do another lap, Familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yes! Now, hurry up and get ready!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I knew it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their second lap goes much the same. Kawakami
Princess can't close the gap after they begin
running.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you sleeping on the job?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's not that she can't compete. She's actively trying not to compete.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're scared, right? You're afraid of running
beside me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, you wouldn't be holding back and
running in such a lame way.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: N-no! It was nothing that serious!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: This is my warning and my vow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There was a time when I wanted to win at all
costs. Unable to suppress my thirst for battle, I
forced it... and I ended up crashing into someone
from your year.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After that, I made a vow! I vowed never to lose
control of myself and run in a way that would
cause anyone trouble ever again.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What the heck?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you, stupid?! Do you honestly think you
can compete like that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The world of racing isn't only about playing it
safe! You're fighting with your body, and there's
always the risk of running into someone!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But we're all willing to take that risk! Didn't she
tell you there was nothing to worry about?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: E-even still, it was my fault for forcing the fight.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So what?! What's wrong with that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's not like you hit her on purpose, so how long
are you gonna keep letting this weigh on you?!
You didn't learn anything from what
happened—you're just moping around!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're just making excuses! You're saying
whatever is convenient to help you avoid looking
at your actual weakness!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If you keep holding back and let someone else
take the lead, are your dreams ever gonna come
true?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No, right?! How can you help anyone if you can't
even value your own feelings?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami. You have to come watch the autumn
Tenno Sho. That's an order!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll make you remember what it feels like to wanna
win!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you're never gonna be any use to me in
this shape!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uuugggh! It's like everyone and their mother
needs magical help! It never ends!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Once you're better, I'm gonna put you to work for
a thousand years!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is fired up and ready for the autumn
Tenno Sho. And so, we begin our summer training
camp.
